en_title: The UGREEN Maxidok Is a Behemoth of a Thunderbolt 5 Dock With 17 Total Ports and Triple Monitor Support
cn_title: UGREEN Maxidok：17口雷电5扩展坞支持三屏

paragraphs.en: It's also reasonably priced compared to the competition.
paragraphs.cn: 相比竞品，价格也颇为合理。

paragraphs.en: Editor's Note: This article is sponsored by UGREEN.
paragraphs.cn: 编者按：本文由绿联（UGREEN）赞助。

paragraphs.en: UGREEN's new Thunderbolt 5 docking stations fill a very particular high-end niche, and the flagship model - the Maxidok 17-in-1 - is the crown jewel of the lineup catered towards the most demanding workstations. It retails for $500, but Amazon currently has it for $389.99 with free shipping exclusively for Amazon Prime members. No the Maxidok isn't inexpensive, but this is still a very competitive price point relative to other comparable TB5 docks on the market.
paragraphs.cn: 绿联（UGREEN）全新雷电5扩展坞瞄准了一个非常特定的高端细分市场，旗舰型号Maxidok 17合1更是该系列的桂冠之作，专为最严苛的工作站需求打造。其官方零售价为500美元（约合人民币3580元），目前亚马逊售价389.99美元（约合人民币2790元），亚马逊Prime会员还可享免运费。Maxidok绝对算不上便宜，但相比市面上其他同级别TB5扩展坞，这个价位依然颇具竞争力。

paragraphs.en: Save $110 Off the UGREEN Maxidok Thunderbolt 5 17-in-1 Dock
paragraphs.cn: 绿联Maxidok 雷电5 17合1扩展坞立省110美元（约合人民币790元）

paragraphs.en: Thunderbolt 5 has the same appearance as a typical USB Type-C port but make no mistake it is a different beast altogether. Whereas USB Type-C Gen 3.2 supports bi-directional transfers of up to 10Gbps (20Gbps unidirectional), TB5 supports bidirectional transfer speeds of 80Gbps (120Gbps in asymmetric mode). Additonally, TB5 is capable of driving three 4K monitors at 144Hz or 8K monitors at 60Hz, all from the same port. It also supports USB Power Delivery up to 240W, which means it can charge pretty much any non-gaming laptop including ThinkPads and Macbook Pros.
paragraphs.cn: 雷电5外观与普通USB Type-C接口完全相同，但请勿误判——它是一头完全不同等级的「猛兽」。USB Type-C Gen 3.2双向传输速率上限为10Gbps（单向20Gbps），而TB5则支持80Gbps的双向传输速率（非对称模式下可达120Gbps）。此外，TB5从同一接口即可驱动三台144Hz的4K显示器或60Hz的8K显示器。它还支持最高240W的USB PD供电，意味着几乎可以为任何非游戏笔记本（包括ThinkPad和MacBook Pro）充电。

paragraphs.en: The UGREEN Maxidok docking station is one of few docks released this year that adopts the new Thunderbolt 5 standard. It connects to your laptop via a single Thunderbolt 5 cable and makes full use of its bandwidth capabilities by expanding it into 17 total ports. The list of ports is as follows:
paragraphs.cn: 绿联Maxidok扩展坞是今年为数不多采用新雷电5标准的产品之一。它通过一根雷电5线缆即可连接笔记本，并充分利用其带宽，将其扩展为17个接口。具体接口配置如下：

paragraphs.en:
- 2x Thunderbolt 5 (downstream)
- Thunderbolt 5 (upstream)
- DisplayPort 2.1
- 3x USB-C (10Gbps)
- 3x USB-A (10Gbps)
- 2.5GbE Gigabit Ethernet
- 3x Audio
- SD card slot
- TF card slot
paragraphs.cn:
- 2× 雷电5（下行）
- 1× 雷电5（上行）
- 1× DisplayPort 2.1
- 3× USB-C（10Gbps）
- 3× USB-A（10Gbps）
- 1× 2.5GbE千兆以太网
- 3× 音频接口
- 1× SD卡槽
- 1× TF卡槽

paragraphs.en: Massive screen real estate and an egregious pixel count
paragraphs.cn: 海量屏幕空间与恐怖像素数

paragraphs.en: The Maxidok also boasts up to triple monitor support.

- Three 4K monitors at up to 144Hz
- Two 8K or 6K monitors at up to 60Hz
paragraphs.cn:
- 三台4K显示器最高144Hz
- 两台8K或6K显示器最高60Hz

paragraphs.en: For comparison, you cannot run either of these setups over Thunderbolt 4. That standard is limited to either three 4K monitors at 60Hz (not 144Hz) or a single 8K monitor. Keep in mind this is also very taxing on your laptop so you'll also have to make sure your components can handle the load.
paragraphs.cn: 作为对比，雷电4根本无法支撑上述任一种配置。该标准的上限是三台60Hz（而非144Hz）的4K显示器，或单台8K显示器。需要注意的是，这种配置对笔记本本身负载极高，你必须确保自己的硬件能扛得住这种压力。

paragraphs.en: The Maxidok doubles as a locally attached storage drive with an empty PCIe Gen4 x4 NVMe M.2 slot that can support up to 8TB of storage. Transferring files over Thunderbolt 5 is blisteringly fast. When using the PCIe Gen 4x4 interface, you can expect speeds of up to 5,000-7000MB/s. Thunderbolt 5's theoretical limit is higher, but the limiting factor is PCI-E.
paragraphs.cn: Maxidok还可兼作本地连接的存储设备——内置一个PCIe Gen4 x4 NVMe M.2空插槽，最高支持8TB存储。通过雷电5传输文件的速度堪称风驰电掣，使用PCIe Gen 4×4接口时，速度可达5000-7000MB/s。雷电5理论上限更高，但瓶颈在PCI-E一侧。

paragraphs.en: All that speed does generate heat, but UGREEN has taken care of that. The Maxidok features an active cooling system with a 60mm fan that exhausts hot air out. The unibody aluminum chassis also helps with heat dissipation.
paragraphs.cn: 如此高速运行必然带来发热，但绿联早已考虑周到。Maxidok配备主动散热系统，由一颗60mm风扇向外排出热风，一体式铝合金外壳同样有助于散热。

paragraphs.en: Eric Song is the IGN commerce manager in charge of finding the best gaming and tech deals every day. When Eric isn't hunting for deals for other people at work, he's hunting for deals for himself during his free time.
paragraphs.cn: Eric Song是IGN商业版块的负责人，每天专门挖掘最佳游戏与科技好物。当Eric不在工作中为他人寻找折扣时，他也会在闲暇时为自己淘宝。
